# Seacoast Building & Design

> Seacoast Building & Design is a Florida-certified general and roofing contractor serving homes, businesses, associations, and multi-family properties across six Gulf Coast counties. The company coordinates roofing, exterior improvements, storm preparation and repair, additions, and selected container-based projects.

Phone: [(941) 500-5431](tel:+19415005431)

Email: [sales@seacoastbd.com](mailto:sales@seacoastbd.com)

Website: [https://seacoastbd.com](https://seacoastbd.com)

Florida Certified General Contractor: CGC1509237

Florida Certified Roofing Contractor: CCC1332648

## Start Here

- [Our Work](https://seacoastbd.com/our-work): Seacoast project videos, completed-work details, and jobsite photos where available.
- [Services](https://seacoastbd.com/services): Roofing, exterior, storm, energy, cleaning, enclosure, and addition services.
- [Service Area](https://seacoastbd.com/service-area): Counties and city pages across Southwest Florida.
- [About Seacoast](https://seacoastbd.com/about): Company leadership, licenses, service area, and project approach.
- [Customer Reviews](https://seacoastbd.com/customer-reviews): Direct links to Google and Better Business Bureau feedback.
- [Contact](https://seacoastbd.com/contact): Request a quote or discuss a property.

## Roofing and Exterior Services

- [Roof Certification Inspection](https://seacoastbd.com/services/roof-certification-inspection): Roof-condition inspections with photos, observed issues, and estimated remaining service life when requested.
- [Roofing](https://seacoastbd.com/services/roofing): Repairs and replacements for tile, metal, shingle, and low-slope roofing systems.
- [Gutters, Fascia, and Soffits](https://seacoastbd.com/services/gutters-fascia-soffits): Installation and repair for drainage, ventilation, and finished roof edges.
- [Siding](https://seacoastbd.com/services/siding): Siding installation and repair for residential, commercial, and multi-family properties.
- [Windows and Doors](https://seacoastbd.com/services/windows-and-doors): Replacement windows and exterior doors, including impact-rated options.
- [Exterior Renovations](https://seacoastbd.com/services/exterior-renovations): Coordinated roofing, siding, trim, paint, and structural exterior work.
- [Exterior Cleaning](https://seacoastbd.com/services/exterior-cleaning-services): Soft washing and pressure cleaning for compatible exterior surfaces.
- [Pool Enclosures and Lanais](https://seacoastbd.com/services/pool-enclosures-lanais): New enclosures, repairs, and re-screening.
- [Room Additions](https://seacoastbd.com/services/room-additions): Additions and enclosed spaces planned around the existing property and local requirements.

## Storm Services

- [Storm Preparedness](https://seacoastbd.com/services/storm-preparedness): Property review, opening inventory, material planning, and written activation terms.
- [Emergency Response](https://seacoastbd.com/services/emergency-response): Call to confirm current availability for boarding, temporary protection, or damage stabilization. Availability depends on safe access, weather, materials, demand, and crew capacity.
- [Storm Damage Repair](https://seacoastbd.com/services/storm-damage-repair): Visible-damage photos, a construction estimate, and agreed roof and exterior repairs. Seacoast does not negotiate insurance coverage or settlements for property owners.
- [Storm Preparation Plans](https://seacoastbd.com/storm-ready): Property-specific planning for homes, associations, and multi-building properties.

Contractor availability is not a substitute for an emergency plan. Follow evacuation orders and local public-safety guidance.

## Solar and Battery Services

- [Solar Services](https://seacoastbd.com/services/solar-services): Ask about solar panels, inverters, battery storage, EV charging, and system maintenance for the property.
- [Solar Panel Cleaning](https://seacoastbd.com/services/solar-panel-cleaning): One-time and recurring cleaning scopes priced for the array, roof, access, and visible condition.
- [Home Battery Backup](https://seacoastbd.com/services/whole-house-battery-systems): Site-specific battery assessment based on circuit priorities, expected loads, equipment compatibility, permitting, and utility requirements.

## Container-Based Projects

- [Container Planning](https://seacoastbd.com/containers): Storage, office, workshop, and guest-space concepts planned around the address, intended use, delivery access, and local requirements.
- [Storage Containers](https://seacoastbd.com/containers/storage): Container condition, delivery, placement, doors, ventilation, coating, shelving, and electrical options quoted for the site.
- [Container Guest Spaces](https://seacoastbd.com/containers/guest-houses): Site- and permit-dependent guest-space concepts with available interior, utility, and exterior-finish options.
- [Container Offices and Workshops](https://seacoastbd.com/containers/offices-workshops): Workspaces planned around equipment, electrical demand, ventilation, access, and finishes.
- [Engineered Container Structures](https://seacoastbd.com/containers/storm-shelters): Emergency use requires a complete, site-specific design. A steel shipping container alone is not a hurricane safe room, and FEMA does not certify products.
- [Finished Mini-Home Example](https://seacoastbd.com/containers/prebuilt): Photos of one finished example; contact Seacoast for current availability, feasibility, and pricing.

Container feasibility, price, schedule, wind performance, and legal use depend on the unit, parcel, design, engineering, permits, inspections, and written project scope.

## Service Area

Seacoast serves Hillsborough, Manatee, Sarasota, Charlotte, Lee, and Collier counties in Florida. City pages include Fort Myers, Cape Coral, Naples, Sarasota, Bradenton, Bonita Springs, Venice, and Punta Gorda. Send the property address so the team can confirm service and scheduling.

## Financing

[Financing information](https://seacoastbd.com/financing) describes options that may be available through Hearth. Participating lenders control eligibility, rates, terms, fees, and funding. Ask Seacoast whether a current option fits the proposed project.

## Source and Accuracy Notes

- Project pages are the source for Seacoast-specific project facts, photos, videos, materials, and completion details.
- Images labeled as representative illustrate a service or concept and are not presented as completed Seacoast projects.
- Prices, schedules, response windows, availability, product performance, financing, and permit requirements are property- and proposal-specific unless a current written Seacoast agreement says otherwise.
- For insurance claims, Seacoast can explain its construction scope and estimate. Coverage advice, settlement negotiation, and claim representation belong with the insurer, property owner, licensed public adjuster, or attorney as appropriate.
